from dataclasses import dataclass

@dataclass
class Triple:
    subject: str
    predicate: str
    object: str

# EVOLVE-BLOCK-START

def predict(triples: list[Triple]) -> str:
    """Convert a list of triples about an athlete into a fluent, single‑sentence description."""
    if not triples:
        return ""

    # Group information by subject
    data = {}
    for t in triples:
        data.setdefault(t.subject, []).append((t.predicate, t.object))

    # Helper to join list with commas and "and"
    def oxford_join(items):
        if not items:
            return ""
        if len(items) == 1:
            return items[0]
        return ", ".join(items[:-1]) + " and " + items[-1]

    sentences = []
    for subj, facts in data.items():
        # Order facts for natural flow
        order = [
            "birthDate", "birthYear", "birthPlace",
            "height", "weight",
            "position", "league", "manager", "ground",
            "currentteam", "currentclub", "club",
            "formerTeam", "draftYear", "draftRound", "draftPick",
            "college", "youthclub"
        ]
        # Collect statements
        parts = []
        # Birth information
        birth_date = next((o for p, o in facts if p == "birthDate"), None)
        birth_year = next((o for p, o in facts if p == "birthYear"), None)
        birth_place = next((o for p, o in facts if p == "birthPlace"), None)
        if birth_date:
            parts.append(f"was born on {birth_date}")
        elif birth_year:
            parts.append(f"was born in {birth_year}")
        if birth_place:
            parts.append(f"in {birth_place}")

        # Physical attributes
        height = next((o for p, o in facts if p == "height"), None)
        weight = next((o for p, o in facts if p == "weight"), None)
        if height:
            parts.append(f"is {height} metres tall")
        if weight:
            parts.append(f"weighs {weight}")

        # Position and league
        position = next((o for p, o in facts if p == "position"), None)
        if position:
            parts.append(f"plays as a {position}")

        league = next((o for p, o in facts if p == "league"), None)
        if league:
            parts.append(f"competes in the {league}")

        manager = next((o for p, o in facts if p == "manager"), None)
        if manager:
            parts.append(f"is managed by {manager}")

        ground = next((o for p, o in facts if p == "ground"), None)
        if ground:
            parts.append(f"home ground is {ground}")

        # Additional predicates with custom phrasing
        city = next((o for p, o in facts if p == "city"), None)
        if city:
            parts.append(f"is based in {city}")

        debut = next((o for p, o in facts if p == "debutTeam"), None)
        if debut:
            parts.append(f"made his debut with {debut}")

        draft_team = next((o for p, o in facts if p == "draftTeam"), None)
        if draft_team:
            parts.append(f"was drafted by {draft_team}")

        country = next((o for p, o in facts if p == "country"), None)
        if country:
            parts.append(f"is located in {country}")

        # Current clubs (club, currentteam, currentclub)
        current_clubs = [o for p, o in facts if p in ("club", "currentteam", "currentclub")]
        if current_clubs:
            parts.append(f"plays for {oxford_join(current_clubs)}")

        # Former teams
        former = [o for p, o in facts if p == "formerTeam"]
        if former:
            parts.append(f"formerly played for {oxford_join(former)}")

        # Draft information
        draft_year = next((o for p, o in facts if p == "draftYear"), None)
        draft_round = next((o for p, o in facts if p == "draftRound"), None)
        draft_pick = next((o for p, o in facts if p == "draftPick"), None)
        if draft_year:
            parts.append(f"was drafted in {draft_year}")
        if draft_round:
            parts.append(f"selected in round {draft_round}")
        if draft_pick:
            parts.append(f"was the {draft_pick}th pick")

        # Education / youth
        college = next((o for p, o in facts if p == "college"), None)
        if college:
            parts.append(f"attended {college}")

        youth = [o for p, o in facts if p == "youthclub"]
        if youth:
            parts.append(f"started at youth club {oxford_join(youth)}")

        # Build final sentence for this subject
        if parts:
            sentence = f"{subj} " + ", ".join(parts) + "."
        else:
            # fallback generic
            generic = " ".join(f"{p} {o}" for p, o in facts)
            sentence = f"{subj} {generic}."
        sentences.append(sentence)

    # Combine multiple subject sentences with a space
    return " ".join(sentences)

# EVOLVE-BLOCK-END
